sizing_rule.note: Capital reallocation rule: Transfer P% of total equity (active + inactive) from active to inactive account at regular N-period intervals. Designed to manage dynamic fractional f allocation and reduce overexposure. Parameters P and N not specified by author—requires trader definition. Program terminates if equity stagnates over N periods.

source_rule_text: Periodically transfer a fixed percentage (P) of total account equity from active to inactive equity over N periods to manage capital allocation and benefit from dynamic fractional f.
